items.title: Keyu Jin: China's Economy, Tariffs, Trade, Trump, Communism & Capitalism | Lex Fridman Podcast #477
items.author: Lex Fridman
items.content:
<article>Keyu Jin is an economist specializing in China's economy, international macroeconomics, global trade imbalances, and financial policy. She is the author of The New China Playbook: Beyond Socialism and Capitalism.
Thank you for listening ❤ Check out our sponsors: https://lexfridman.com/sponsors/ep477-sb
See below for timestamps, transcript, and to give feedback, submit questions, contact Lex, etc.

*Transcript:*
https://lexfridman.com/keyu-jin-transcript

*AMA* - submit questions, videos or call-in: https://lexfridman.com/ama
*Hiring* - join our team: https://lexfridman.com/hiring
*Other* - other ways to get in touch: https://lexfridman.com/contact

Keyu's X: https://x.com/KeyuJin
Keyu's Website: https://keyujin.com/

0:00 - Introduction
0:47 - Misconceptions about China
5:17 - Education in China

33:40 - Growing up in China
39:18 - First time in the US

50:45 - Jack Ma
56:58 - China's view on innovation and copying ideas

1:26:28 - Taiwan
